summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AyuCare app - Ayurvedic Practice Management & Nutrient Analysis Software. Backend APIs are 93.75% functional with only AI generation failing due to OpenAI quota limits. Frontend loads correctly with proper authentication flow and navigation.

critical_bugs.issue: OpenAI API quota exceeded - returns 429 error
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks AI diet chart generation feature
critical_bugs.details: Error: You exceeded your current quota, please check your plan and billing details

integration_issues.issue: JWT token appears to expire quickly during testing

passed_tests: User registration flow - create new account
User login flow - authenticate with credentials
Dashboard loads with statistics after login
Patient CRUD - create, read, update, delete patients
Patient profile with Ayurvedic fields (Prakriti, Vikriti, BMI calculation)
Food database - search and filter by category, rasa, virya
Food detail view showing Ayurvedic properties
Patient form validation and data persistence
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix OpenAI API quota issue - either update API key with sufficient credits or implement fallback mechanism for AI diet generation. Consider adding better session management for JWT tokens.
